# Aledo Locksmith

> Professional mobile automotive locksmith serving Aledo, TX and nearby areas within a 10-mile radius. Licensed, insured, available 24/7. Bilingual service (English and Spanish).

## Contact Information
- Business Name: Aledo Locksmith
- Phone (Call): (817) 634-5045
- Phone (Text): (817) 586-9634
- Location: Aledo, TX 76008
- Service Area: 10-mile radius around Aledo, TX (including Willow Park, Annetta, Hudson Oaks, Walsh)
- Hours: 24/7 including holidays
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Website: https://aledolocksmith.net

## Core Services
- Car Lockout: Emergency vehicle lockout service, non-damaging entry for all makes and models
- Car Key Replacement: On-site key cutting and programming for lost or broken car keys
- Key Fob Programming: Remote and key fob programming for all vehicle brands
- Transponder Key Programming: Chip key programming for vehicle immobilizer systems
- Ignition Repair & Replacement: On-site ignition cylinder repair and replacement
- Emergency Car Locksmith (24/7): Round-the-clock emergency automotive locksmith response
- Trunk Lockout: Non-damaging trunk access when keys are locked inside
- Broken Car Key Extraction: Safe removal of broken key fragments from locks and ignitions
- Duplicate Car Keys: On-site spare key cutting and programming

## Advanced Automotive Programming Services
- ECU & Computer Programming: Engine Control Unit reflashing, replacement programming, VIN coding, and immobilizer sync for all makes and models
- Smart Key & Keyless Entry: Proximity smart key and push-to-start fob programming, all-keys-lost service
- ECM/TCM/BCM/ABS Module Programming: Control module setup, VIN writing, parameter configuration using dealer-level J2534 and OEM tools
- Airbag Reset & Crash Module Repair: SRS airbag module crash data clearing and restoration to factory condition after collisions
- Performance Tuning & ECU Remapping: Custom ECU tuning for horsepower, torque, fuel economy gains on gas and diesel vehicles

## European & Specialty Vehicle Services
- Mercedes ELV Steering Lock Repair: Electronic Steering Lock repair and replacement for Mercedes-Benz W204, W207, W212 models
- BMW FRM Footwell Module Repair: Circuit board repair and reprogramming for BMW FRM/FRM3 modules
- Saab Steering Lock Bypass: Permanent steering column lock bypass for Saab 9-3 and 9-5 vehicles
- GM VATS Bypass & Disable: Vehicle Anti-Theft System bypass for Chevrolet, Pontiac, Buick, Cadillac, Oldsmobile
- Dodge/Chrysler WIN Module & FOBIK: Wireless Ignition Node replacement and FOBIK key programming
- Dodge/Chrysler VIN Swap & Programming: VIN writing to replacement PCM, BCM, and instrument clusters using wiTECH
- VW Immobilizer Off (IMMO OFF): Immobilizer delete for Volkswagen and Audi ECU swaps, race builds, and all-keys-lost scenarios

## Service Details
- Mobile service: We come to your location (home, work, parking lot, roadside)
- Response time: Typically 20-30 minutes in the Aledo area
- No tow needed: All services performed on-site
- Pricing: Upfront quotes before work begins, no hidden fees
- Equipment: Dealer-level diagnostic tools, J2534 pass-through programming, OEM manufacturer software subscriptions

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What areas does Aledo Locksmith serve?
We serve Aledo, TX and nearby areas within a 10-mile radius, including Willow Park, Annetta, Annetta North, Annetta South, Hudson Oaks, Walsh, and parts of Weatherford and western Fort Worth. ZIP codes: 76008, 76087, 76086.

### Is Aledo Locksmith available 24/7?
Yes. We offer 24/7 emergency automotive locksmith services, including holidays. Call (817) 634-5045 anytime.

### How fast can Aledo Locksmith get to me?
Our average response time is 20-30 minutes for locations in the Aledo, TX area.

### Can you make car keys without the original key?
Yes. We can create new car keys from scratch using your vehicle's VIN and our professional key cutting and programming equipment. No original key or dealer visit needed.

### Do you work on all car brands?
Yes. We service all major brands including Ford, Chevy, Toyota, Honda, Nissan, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Volkswagen, Dodge, Chrysler, Jeep, Ram, Hyundai, Kia, Subaru, Lexus, Infiniti, Acura, and more.

### How much does a car locksmith cost in Aledo?
Pricing varies by service and vehicle. Car lockouts start at a lower rate; key programming and ECU services vary by vehicle complexity. We always provide an upfront quote before work begins — no hidden fees.

### Do you program smart keys and key fobs?
Yes. We program all types of smart keys, proximity fobs, FOBIK keys, and keyless entry remotes on-site for all major vehicle brands.

### Can you program ECU and control modules?
Yes. We provide dealer-level ECU programming, module configuration (ECM, TCM, BCM, ABS), VIN writing, and immobilizer synchronization for all makes and models using J2534 and OEM tools.

### Do you speak Spanish?
Yes. We are a fully bilingual team — hablamos español. Our entire website is also available in Spanish at https://aledolocksmith.net/es/

### Do I need to tow my car to a dealer?
No. Our mobile service comes to your location with all necessary tools and equipment. We perform all services on-site — no tow needed.
